name: Perak (Malaysia)
description: A horizontal triband of white over yellow over black, in equal proportions.
history: The state flag of Perak, on the western coast of Peninsular Malaysia. White represents the Raja Muda (heir apparent), yellow the Sultan, black the Raja Bendahara (chief minister) — together symbolising the three royal houses of Perak.

features.symbolism: the three royal houses of Perak
